text: as we work towards Universal Health
Coverage or UHC we need to ensure that Healthcare is
accessible and affordable so that
everyone is protected from Financial
storms affordable access to healthcare
is known as Financial Protection it is
not only critical for UHC it is a
sustainable development goal countries
across Europe and Central Asia have made
good progress towards
UHC but many people will still
experience gaps in coverage this means
they face barriers to access or have to
pay out of pocket for Health Care
sometimes at the expense of other basic
needs in this way outof pocket payments
can push people into poverty we need to
find ways to reduce these payments but
we can't do that without the right
information on where and why things are
going wrong we also need to know what to
change to make things better this is why
wh Europe has created UHC watch an
online platform with data and Analysis
on unmet need financial hardship Health
spending and coverage policy in
countries across Europe and Central
Asia designed for policy makers and
advisers academics journalists and Civil
Society advocacy groups UHC watch makes
it easy to find the evidence resources
and good practice recommendations you
need you can visit the country profiles
for a snapshot of who experiences unmet
need and financial hardship and the
health services and policies that are
responsible you can use the indicator
and policy explorers to get a better
understanding of the current situation
and to monitor Trends over
time you can generate your own analysis
comparing indicators and policies across
countries and exporting data and
Graphics UHC watch has the evidence and
Analysis we need to move us closer to
Universal Health Coverage UHC watch tracking progress on
affordable Access to Health Care in
Europe and Central Asia
